# 闪图 Fdesign V3.0

Fdesign is an open-source Photoshop + Excel PSD automation workbench for ecommerce image production.

闪图 Fdesign 是一个开源的本机 PSD 批量作图工作台，面向电商设计师、运营和自动化开发者。它把 Excel 商品数据、商品图和 PSD 模板变量绑定起来，再通过本机 Adobe Photoshop 批量导出 PSD、PSB、PNG 和 JPEG 成品。

## Best Starting Points

- Project page: https://kriswd.github.io/Fdesign/
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/Kriswd/Fdesign
- Chinese start-here guide: https://github.com/Kriswd/Fdesign/blob/main/docs/START_HERE_CN.md
- Quickstart CN: https://github.com/Kriswd/Fdesign/blob/main/docs/QUICKSTART_CN.md
- Demo kit: https://github.com/Kriswd/Fdesign/tree/main/docs/demo-kit
- Showcase index: https://github.com/Kriswd/Fdesign/tree/main/docs/showcases
- Troubleshooting CN: https://github.com/Kriswd/Fdesign/blob/main/docs/TROUBLESHOOTING_CN.md
- FAQ: https://github.com/Kriswd/Fdesign/blob/main/docs/FAQ.md
- Bilibili demo: https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1YDTA6nEeN/

## What It Does

- Imports PSD templates and identifies replaceable text, image and artboard variables.
- Binds Excel columns, image manifests and PSD variables into repeatable production tasks.
- Runs locally on Windows with Adobe Photoshop, without uploading private assets to a cloud image service.
- Exports PSD, PSB, PNG and JPEG files for product images, detail pages and multi-artboard templates.
- Provides public demo data, sanitized showcases and troubleshooting examples for first-time trial users.

## Good Fit

- Ecommerce designers reducing repeated PSD edits.
- Ecommerce operators turning spreadsheet rows into repeatable image production tasks.
- Automation developers studying a React + Node.js + Photoshop JSX/VBS local workflow.
- Small teams that need local-first PSD automation and clear public feedback paths.

## Requirements

- Windows 10/11 x64.
- Node.js 18+.
- Adobe Photoshop installed locally and callable by scripts.

## Feedback

Use GitHub Issues or Discussions with sanitized examples only. Do not upload private PSD templates, real product images, account information, tokens, backend screenshots or unredacted fields.
